hero.logoAlt: Crock Spot - Slow Cooked Gourmet Cuisine
hero.subheadlineSuffix: by 5280 Magazine. Slow-cooked gourmet cuisine that fills you up without bogging you down.

familyBanner.headline: A Family Affair — Steven & Mandy Smith
familyBanner.description: Crock Spot is owned by Steven Smith, husband of The Spot's own Mandy Smith. Two great catering options, one family passion for great food!

whyCrockSpot.subheadline: Fast, delicious, and built for high-volume events. Perfect for corporate gatherings, government contracts, and large-scale catering.

items.title: Lightning Fast Service
items.description: Our quick-serve concept serves guests in 25 seconds or less — perfect for time-sensitive events.

items.title: High Volume Capacity
items.description: We can serve up to 100 people per hour from our food trucks. No long lines, no waiting.

items.title: Government Contract Ready
items.description: Fully equipped to handle government contracts with proper certifications and compliance.

items.title: Mobile Convenience
items.description: 15 years of food truck experience. We bring the kitchen to you — anywhere in Denver Metro.

menuSection.description: Our "choose your own adventure" concept lets guests customize their perfect meal. Slow-cooked proteins over healthy grain bases, topped with international sauces. All dietary needs welcome — including vegetarian and vegan options!

highlights.title: Build-A-Bowl
highlights.description: Choose your base, protein, sauce, and toppings. Served in 25 seconds or less!

highlights.title: Breakfast Options
highlights.description: English & Colorado style buffets, continental boards, bagel boards, and breakfast burritos.

highlights.title: BYO Bars
highlights.description: Taco, tostada, nacho, chili, and mac n cheese bars with all the fixings.

highlights.title: Grazing Tables
highlights.description: Stunning charcuterie spreads with cheeses, fruits, crackers, and hot appetizers.

menuSection.serviceOptionsFootnote: Custom menus available for any event size

governmentSection.headline: Government Contract Ready
governmentSection.description: Crock Spot is fully equipped to handle government contracts and large-scale corporate events. We have the capacity, the certifications, and 15+ years of experience delivering high-volume catering with precision timing.

finalCta.subheadline: Whether it's a corporate lunch, government event, or community gathering — Crock Spot brings award-winning food truck catering to you.
